name: ark-space
description: ArkSpace is a creative workspace for orchestrating reusable agent skills, roles, and workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Lightweight role routing and reusable skills for general agents
interface.longDescription: Use ArkSpace to orchestrate reusable agent skills, roles, and workflows through a lightweight Orchestrator and source-governed skill registry.
defaultPrompt: Help me route this task to the right agent role.
Help me create or improve a skill.
